start.speaker: elara
start.text: You're back. Let me see the moonpetal — quickly, it starts losing potency the moment it's cut.

options.text: [Give moonpetal sprigs] Here. Five sprigs, just as you asked.
I found something else. The Church Outpost has moonpetal growing in their gardens.
I... don't have the herbs. Fenrick made me an offer I couldn't refuse.

examine_herbs.speaker: elara
examine_herbs.text: These are perfect. Still silver at the edges — you picked them at the right time. Now comes the hard part. I need to brew this precisely. Will you help me measure?

options.text: Tell me exactly what to do. I'll follow your instructions to the letter.
People are dying. Let's move fast — approximate the measurements.
You know herbs better than I do. I'll just watch.

brewing_success.speaker: elara
brewing_success.text: It's done. The color is right — pale silver with a blue shimmer. This is it. This is the cure.

administer_choice.speaker: elara
administer_choice.text: Old Thomas first. He's the weakest. Then Bess. Then little Aldwin. Stay with me — I may need help holding them still.

administer_result.speaker: elara
administer_result.text: Thomas is breathing easier already. Bess opened her eyes. And Aldwin... he asked for his mother. They're going to live.

elara_gratitude.speaker: elara
elara_gratitude.text: My father couldn't save this village. But maybe... maybe we can. Thank you. I won't forget this.

brewing_rushed.speaker: elara
brewing_rushed.text: The color's wrong. It should be silver, not grey. But we don't have time to redo it — the moonpetal is spent. We have to try.

rushed_result.speaker: elara
rushed_result.text: Thomas... Thomas is convulsing. No. No no no — hold him down! Hold him —

thomas_dies.speaker: elara
thomas_dies.text: He's gone. The mixture was too concentrated. I killed him. I... I was trying to save him and I killed him.

options.text: It wasn't your fault. You tried. That's more than anyone else did.
I told you we should have been more careful.

elara_grieving.speaker: elara
elara_grieving.text: I need to be alone. Please. Just... go.

elara_crushed.speaker: elara
elara_crushed.text: You're right. I know you're right. Just leave me. Please.

church_revelation.speaker: elara
church_revelation.text: What? They had moonpetal this whole time? While people were dying, the Church was sitting on the cure?

church_anger.speaker: elara
church_anger.text: Maren. That sanctimonious — he watched Thomas suffer. He watched Bess turn grey. He knew. HE KNEW.

options.text: Let's confront him together. The village deserves to know.
Forget Maren for now. Let's get the moonpetal from the Outpost and save the sick first.

confront_agree.speaker: elara
confront_agree.text: Yes. Everyone needs to see what the Church really is. But first — we get that moonpetal. No one else dies while we argue about blame.

pragmatic_response.speaker: elara
pragmatic_response.text: You're right. Lives first, justice later. But I won't forget this. And neither will the village.

betrayal_reaction.speaker: elara
betrayal_reaction.text: You sold them. You sold the cure. People are going to die because you wanted coin.

betrayal_continued.speaker: elara
betrayal_continued.text: Get out of my sight. Don't come back. Don't speak to me. Don't even look at me.
